summary.intent: Address three PR review comments: fix type annotation on _load_mr_approvers_from_group_config to dict[str, list[str]], move dry_run check before get_mr_from_url() call in gitlab.py, and tighten the mr_approvers JSON schema validation.
summary.outcome: Made all three code changes and verified tests pass (35 + 74 tests), but discovered formatting needs to be fixed on test_release_from_fbc.py before committing.

repo: Project uses ruff for linting and formatting with make format-check target that must pass
ocp-build-data-validator tests run separately and need to pass when modifying JSON schemas
Dry-run mode is checked both in pipeline code (release_from_fbc.py) and library code (gitlab.py) for defense in depth

code.finding: Type annotations should be specific (dict[str, list[str]]) rather than generic (dict) to match downstream function signatures and provide better type safety
In dry-run mode, API calls like get_mr_from_url() should be skipped entirely by checking self.dry_run early, before attempting to fetch resources that may not exist with placeholder URLs
JSON schemas should use additionalProperties with array/string constraints rather than bare object type to validate nested structures like mr_approvers mapping group names to username arrays

workflow: Run format checks (make format or ruff format) before committing to catch formatting issues early
When modifying dry-run behavior, update corresponding tests to not expect mocked API calls that are now skipped

friction: Format check failed at the end after all tests passed, blocking the commit - should have run formatting earlier
open_items: Need to run ruff format on test_release_from_fbc.py and then commit the review feedback fixes
